experiences.role: DevSecOps and Fullstack Engineer (Ahli Muda Bidang IT)
description: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk is one of Indonesia's leading state-owned enterprises in the construction and infrastructure sector.
Design, develop, and maintain fullstack applications (web & API) and coordinate secure architectures.
Build and manage CI/CD pipelines for automated deployment and containerize applications using Docker and manage orchestration with Kubernetes (K3s).
Implement GitOps workflow using ArgoCD and manage private container registry and image lifecycle.
Monitor system performance, logs, and uptime in real-time, executing troubleshooting across distributed environments.
Apply security best practices (DevSecOps) across pipeline and infrastructure, hardening nodes and clusters.
Integrate AI into CI/CD pipelines (smart testing, failure prediction) and build AI-driven monitoring systems (AIOps).
Design scalable, modular, and maintainable system architectures, defining microservices architecture & service communication patterns.
PT Eka Bogainti (HokBen) is a Japanese-style fast-food restaurant with application mobile and web hokben for order delivery, take-away, and dine-in across over 500 active stores.
Developed and maintained mobile app, web-based and internal enterprise applications to support business operations and digital transformation initiatives.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs and backend services to handle business logic and data processing.
Built and enhanced frontend interfaces using modern frameworks to improve user experience and system usability.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (business, operations, QA) to gather requirements and deliver scalable solutions.
Optimized application performance, database queries, and system responsiveness.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines to automate build, testing, and deployment processes using Docker for environment consistency.
Managed application deployment and environment configuration in Linux servers, monitoring system performance and logs.
Applied secure coding practices and participated in maintaining system security and access control.

Collaborated with backend developers, UI/UX designers, and QA teams to deliver high-quality applications.
Performed debugging, testing, and performance optimization to ensure application stability and reliability.
PT. Generasi Informasi Optima is an IT startup focused on delivering scalable backend, frontend, and system integration services.
Designed and developed end-to-end scalable applications, covering frontend, backend, and system integration layers.
Built and maintained RESTful APIs using Express.js and Laravel, enabling seamless communication between frontend, mobile, and backend systems.
Developed modern frontend applications using ReactJS and contributed to cross-platform mobile development using React Native and Flutter.
Integrated enterprise systems using middleware solutions (Software AG) to support data exchange and business process automation across multiple services.
Implemented and optimized API communication, authentication, and data flow between systems and third-party services.
Developed and maintained mobile applications for iOS using Swift UI, enhancing cross-platform ecosystem integration.
Applied clean architecture principles and ensured code maintainability, scalability, and performance optimization.
Developed and maintained Android mobile applications using Android Studio for business and client requirements.
Designed and implemented native mobile features using Java/Kotlin, ensuring smooth performance and user experience.
Integrated mobile applications with RESTful APIs to enable real-time data interaction with backend systems.
Built user-friendly interfaces following mobile UI/UX best practices.
Performed debugging, testing, and issue fixing to improve application stability and performance.

projects.title: SecureCI: DevSecOps Shift-Left Pipeline Blueprint
projects.description: An automated Kubernetes deployment pipeline incorporating SAST, validation checks, and image-hardening audits before pushing workloads to Amazon EKS.
projects.details: Automates the entire integration workflow. It validates Dockerfiles with Hadolint, scans application libraries with Snyk, inspects built container layers with Trivy, validates cloud manifests via Kubeval, and automatically triggers ArgoCD to pull hardened revisions. It eliminates manual QA bottlenecks and guarantees that zero high-severity CVEs enter the master registry.

projects.title: GuardianDash: Live Cloud SIEM and Threat Tracker
projects.description: Real-time threat monitoring dashboard aggregating system-entry logs, open port profiles, and authentication anomalies.
projects.details: Collects system performance statistics and active network events using a custom-built daemon. It processes security authentication registries (auth.log) to intercept SSH brute-force actions, automatically sets local IP bans with Fail2ban, and sends interactive metric aggregates to a live Grafana workspace, providing instant awareness over exposed servers.

projects.title: AuthFlow: Enterprise RBAC Multi-tenant Boilerplate
projects.description: Extensible business template with hierarchical Role-Based Access Controls, cryptographically verified token sessions, and database clustering definitions.
projects.details: Solves enterprise onboarding needs securely. It is standard-compliant and provides sub-tenant partitioning, rate-limiting layers on critical login routes, bcrypt password hashing, JWT key rotation protocols, and standard SQL tables built with raw indexing, complete with dynamic dashboards and administration management control screens.

sidebar.bio: A highly capable Fullstack Engineer specializing in DevSecOps & AI integration. Designing high-performance distributed systems, AIOps, and intelligent automated security workflows.
